receivingCourses.title: Calculus and Analytic Geometry for Science and Engineering

courses.title: Calculus and Analytic Geometry for Science and Engineering

notes.content: DATED MATERIAL, SUBJECT TO CHANGE. PLEASE CONSULT CURRENT UCSD GENERAL CATALOG FOR ANY ADDITIONAL INFORMATION. Effective Fall 2018, major preparation will be required for this major. For details, visit: http://admissions.ucsd.edu/MajorPrep For more information please visit https://math.ucsd.edu/students/undergraduate/ma29-mathematics-b-s/ NOTE: If no 20E equivalency is listed below, students who have completed vector calculus material in their Calc III course must successfully petition this class for 20E equivalency. Petitions must include course syllabus, textbook information and details on the final exam (including modality). More information on the petition process can be found at the following site: https://www.math.ucsd.edu/students/undergraduate/petitions
notes.contentHtml:
DATED MATERIAL, SUBJECT TO CHANGE. PLEASE CONSULT CURRENT UCSD GENERAL CATALOG FOR ANY ADDITIONAL INFORMATION.


Effective Fall 2018, major preparation will be required for this major. For details, visit: http://admissions.ucsd.edu/MajorPrep


For more information please visit https://math.ucsd.edu/students/undergraduate/ma29-mathematics-b-s/


NOTE: If no 20E equivalency is listed below, students who have completed vector calculus material in their Calc III course must successfully petition this class for 20E equivalency. Petitions must include course syllabus, textbook information and details on the final exam (including modality). More information on the petition process can be found at the following site: https://www.math.ucsd.edu/students/undergraduate/petitions
